subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who made His remembrance and praise the feast table of His saints, and His love and good-pleasure their paradise.
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی جعل مائده اولیائه ذکره و ثنائه و جنتهم حبه و رضائه انه لهو
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God as mirror, @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for peace and unity
